mapper.insert: insert into production_order (order_no, plan_no, line_no, order_name, quantity, quantity_produced, qualified_products, defective_products, status, remark, actual_start_time, actual_end_time, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time) value (#{orderNo}, #{planNo}, #{lineNo}, #{orderName}, #{quantity}, 0, 0, 0, 'CREATED', #{remark}, null, null, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, now(), now())
